questions.hindi: मैं बचपन में तैर सकता था।
options: I could swim when I was a child.
questions.answer: I could swim when I was a child.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं बचपन में तैर सकता था।" = "I could swim when I was a child."
Full sentence: "Could you help me?"
Correct sentence: "He could run fast before."
Correct translation: "यह सच हो सकता है।" = "It could be true."
Full sentence: "Could I ask a question?"

questions.sentence: I coulds not do this before.
options: I coulds not do this before.
I could not do this before.
questions.answer: I could not do this before.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I could not do this before."

questions.hindi: वे इसे पहले संभाल सकते थे।
options: I could swim when I was a child.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वे इसे पहले संभाल सकते थे।" = "They could handle it before."
Full sentence: "Could you tell me again?"
Correct sentence: "It could rain."

questions.hindi: मैं यह किताब पढ़ सकता था।
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं यह किताब पढ़ सकता था।" = "I could read this book."
Full sentence: "She could sing before."

questions.sentence: Could I take your pen? yesterday.
options: Could I take your pen? yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Could I take your pen?"

questions.hindi: हम पहले साथ काम कर सकते थे।
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "हम पहले साथ काम कर सकते थे।" = "We could work together before."
Full sentence: "This could be a mistake."

questions.sentence: Could you close the door? yesterday.
options: Could you close the door? yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Could you close the door?"

questions.hindi: वह किसी भी भाषा सीख सकता था।
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वह किसी भी भाषा सीख सकता था।" = "He could learn any language."
Full sentence: "I could understand this before."
Correct sentence: "Could I sit here?"

options: I could not do this before.
